[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Forma''' was a crewmember and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] for the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]]. He commanded their transport ''[[Draisini]]'', which he [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] to a diplomatic meeting between the Guild and the representatives of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Refusing to compromise, he left to pick up an undocumented cargo. Upon picking up the cargo on [[Genon]], he was attacked by agents of [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and was [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] for information before being turned over to the [[Zanibar]].
